mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsPblancApplyBhExmntDao.selectList */ select ubbe.bh_exmnt_id , ubbe.bh_exmnt_div_nm , ubbei.bh_exmnt_iem_id , ubbei.bh_exmnt_iem_nm , ubpabe.ceck_result_div_cd from uspt_bsns_bh_exmnt ubbe inner join uspt_bsns_bh_exmnt_iem ubbei on ubbei.bh_exmnt_id = ubbe.bh_exmnt_id left outer join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_bh_exmnt ubpabe on ubpabe.bh_exmnt_iem_id = ubbei.bh_exmnt_iem_id and ubpabe.apply_id = #{applyId} where bsns_cd = #{bsnsCd}
